prompt: I need to add a new input to the model: a discount rate of 8% for future DCF analysis. Create a Named Range called Inp_Discount_Rate on the Assumptions sheet, and put it in cell B8.
assertions: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py create-range <file> Inp_Discount_Rate Assumptions B8'
Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py write <file> Inp_Discount_Rate 0.08' to set the value
Verifies the range was created correctly (either via read or inspect)
Uses the correct IDFA naming convention (Inp_ prefix for an input assumption)
Does not manually edit the xlsx with openpyxl — uses the idfa_ops.py script
